---
title: "Why can I not use my private domain name for my forum email address?"
date: 2008-12-21
forum: Forum Feedback &amp; Help
---

### Post by ggb-uk on 2008-12-21
[LEFT][COLOR=black]xLde>en Googlec[IMG]http://ubuntuforums.org/data:image/png;base64,[/IMG]
[/COLOR][/LEFT]
I have spent the last two days trying to set up an account on this forum, but the required confirmation email that should have arrived in my inbox to confirm my email address did not arrive.  This was using my private domain name (bolgar.co.uk).

I subsequently changed my email address to a yahoo email address I sometimes use, and everything worked smoothly.

Do you have an aversion to private domain names?

---

### Post by jpeddicord on 2008-12-21
Are you running a spam filter like SpamAssassin? There's a good chance it was caught by it.

---

### Post by ggb-uk on 2008-12-21
[LEFT][COLOR=black]xLde>en Googlec[IMG]http://ubuntuforums.org/data:image/png;base64,[/IMG]
[/COLOR][/LEFT]
jacobmp92,

Personally, I am not, but my web hosting company, despite all my protestations asking them to disable it, continues to run one.

Thanks.

---

### Post by matthew on 2008-12-21
You should be able to use any real domain and have it work on our end. I agree, the email probably got caught by an overzealous spam filter somewhere.

---
